parameters.content:
## Health Tech Nerds Scraper v1

Fetches jobs from jobs.healthtechnerds.com static JSON endpoint.

**Schedule:** Every 6 hours

**Filters:**
- CX leadership roles (support/success + manager/director/lead)
- Skips Slack-only postings

**Pipeline:** Job Evaluation Pipeline v6.1

## No Jobs Branch

Either no CX leadership jobs found or all jobs already in Airtable
